title: duranta repens var. microphylla
intro: Duranta repens var. microphylla, also known as the golden dewdrop or skyflower, is a tropical evergreen shrub native to Central and South America, characterized by its blue flowers and golden foliage. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Duranta repens var. microphylla include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are then used to treat various health conditions.
